title: Crispy Cedar Ukrainian Teque os Skewers
description: Indulgent Ukrainian dish featuring pre-fried teque os, served on a cedar plank with herbal notes, this recipe is ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly and offers a snappy texture.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the pre-fried teque os onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, garlic, dill, parsley, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto the teque os, making sure they are fully coated.
Place the skewers onto the soaked cedar planks, leaving a small space between each skewer.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the teque os.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
